improvements.prompt_change: Before launching Code Review Agent, commit and push all implementation changes, then verify the PR has non-empty file diffs.
improvements.why: Prevents empty-diff reviews and avoids false critical findings.

improvements.prompt_change: Require mapping each acceptance criterion to exact file paths and line ranges in the implementation before requesting review.
improvements.why: Makes it easier for the reviewer to validate completeness quickly.

improvements.prompt_change: If the issue is documentation-only, explicitly tell the reviewer to perform a docs-focused review rather than code-only review.
improvements.why: Improves relevance of review feedback for spec-only changes.
